summary: Tested client-centric messaging features (iteration 93). All 5 features verified working: 1) Message model client_id auto-population, 2) Provider can message linked clients without share_requests, 3) New endpoint GET /api/provider/clients/{client_id}/messages, 4) Existing appointments/notes endpoints work, 5) Delete notes endpoint works.

minor.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 for successful creation (cosmetic)

critical_code_review_comments: Message model (lines 1220-1238) correctly includes optional client_id field
send_message (lines 6548-6585) properly auto-resolves client_id from clients collection via linked_mom_id lookup
New /provider/clients/{client_id}/messages endpoint (lines 6618-6649) correctly queries messages by client_id and linked_mom_id
check_provider_can_message (lines 7791-7810) now checks both share_requests AND clients collection for linked relationships
seed_data_creation: Test messages and notes created with TEST_ prefix during testing (cleaned up where possible)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Client-centric messaging features fully functional. Key demo data: demo_client_ce5d46b9 (Olivia Davis, linked to demo_mom_fc6854cc). Messages between provider and linked mom automatically get client_id populated. New endpoint /api/provider/clients/{client_id}/messages returns all messages for a specific client relationship.

message_model_client_id.evidence: Message sent from doula to mom returns client_id: demo_client_8409a7af in response

provider_can_message_linked_clients.evidence: Doula can message mom via linked client relationship (clients collection checked)

client_messages_endpoint.evidence: GET /api/provider/clients/demo_client_ce5d46b9/messages returns 3 messages with correct client_id

delete_notes_endpoint.evidence: DELETE /api/provider/notes/{note_id} returns 200 with message 'Note deleted', verified note removed from list
delete_notes_endpoint.note: Previous iteration reported duplicate route bug (line 3177) - appears to be fixed or using correct route now

TestClientMessagesEndpoint.test_get_client_messages_returns_message: PASSED - Returns correct messages for client

TestDeleteNotesEndpoint.test_create_and_delete_note: PASSED - Create and delete note successfully
